### Code Examples
```html
<fastpix-player
  id="player"
  playback-id="<PLAYBACK_ID>"
  stream-type="on-demand"
  token="<PLAYBACK_TOKEN>"
></fastpix-player>
```

Or with npm/ESM:

```javascript
import '@fastpix/fp-player';
// Use <fastpix-player> in your app
```
